changelog:
🌸 Custom Video Wallpapers Visibility & Layering Fix
• Fixed a rendering issue where custom MP4 video live wallpapers were hidden behind the opaque body element or had opacity: 0 by default. Background transparent layout overlays are now correctly applied when custom themes are active!
• Integrated native browse dialog boxes for selecting local image and video background files.
• Automatically redirects and displays the Custom Theme Builder config card as soon as you select '🎨 Custom Theme Builder' from the header appearance dropdown.

🎵 Custom Live Video Wallpapers & MP4 Importing
• Added support to import local MP4 videos or online streams as live wallpaper backgrounds!
• Paste a local file path (e.g. C:\Users\SHIVANSH\Downloads\wallpaper\live\cherry-blossom-2-moewalls-com.mp4) or any video URL directly into the Theme Customizer.
• High-performance video background playback with automatic media streaming supporting range-seeking requests!

🎨 Theme Builder & Custom Styling
• Full-featured Custom Theme Builder to Appearance settings!
• Customize Accent colors, panel glass transparency levels, and glass blurs
• Set custom background images (paste any link) showing beautifully under glass cards
• Native QuickCSS Editor allowing you to write your own stylesheet rules in real-time!

🔧 Stability & Bug Fixes
• Included preload.js whitelisting in distribution package
• Fixed tab navigation crash and dynamic playlist row caching
• Installer now runs completely silently and auto-launches the new app when finished!
